messages.content: What's the capital of Spain?
Madrid.
Is the meeting tomorrow at 9 AM?
Yes, it's at 9 AM.
Hi, this is Jason calling from the vet. Hello?
Hello Jason — this is Emma at the clinic.
Please set an alarm for 7:00 AM.
Alarm set for 7:00 AM.
Which is colder, ice or steam?
Ice.
How do I tie a shoelace?
Cross the laces, make a loop with each, then tie the loops together.
List the colors of a traffic light top to bottom.
Red, yellow, green.
I'll pick up Maya at 4:30, okay?
Okay — I noted you'll pick up Maya at 4:30.
Who wrote 'Romeo and Juliet'?
William Shakespeare.
Do you accept returns after 30 days?
No, returns must be within 30 days.
Good morning, this is Priya from reception.
Good morning, Priya — this is Mark in HR.
Send a quick reminder email to the team.
Reminder email sent to the team.
Which tastes sweeter, a banana or a lemon?
Banana.
How do I boil an egg?
Place eggs in boiling water for about 9 to 12 minutes depending on how you like the yolk.
Put the steps in order: bake, mix, preheat oven.
Preheat the oven, then mix, then bake.
My flight lands at 2:15 PM, can you note that?
Noted — your flight is scheduled to land at 2:15 PM.
What's the currency of Japan?
Yen.
Are dogs mammals?
Yes.
Hey, are you free to chat?
Hi — I'm available to chat now.
List three items to pack for a beach day.
Towel, sunscreen, and water.
Hi, it's Sarah. Are you free to talk for a few minutes?
Yes, I'm free now.
Did you lock the back door after dinner, Tom?
No, I didn't lock it yet.
What's the capital of Italy?
Rome.
Please send the meeting agenda to everyone on the list.
I'll send the agenda to the group right away.
Which is bigger, a cat or a mouse?
A cat is bigger than a mouse.
How do I boil an egg?
Put eggs in a pot, cover with water, bring to a boil, then simmer for about 9–12 minutes.
List the days of the weekend.
Saturday and Sunday.
I'm arriving at 3 PM, is that okay?
That's fine — see you at 3 PM.
Good morning — this is Mark. Are you awake?
Good morning, Mark. I'm awake.
Is water wet?
Yes.
What color is the sky on a clear day?
Blue.
Remind me to call Anna at noon.
Reminder set: call Anna at 12:00 PM.
Which weighs more, an apple or a pineapple?
A pineapple typically weighs more than an apple.
How do I tie my shoelaces?
Cross the laces, make a loop with one, wrap the other lace around and pull through, then tighten.
What's first during the day: breakfast, lunch, or dinner?
Breakfast comes first.
I've packed the tickets in my bag, right?
Yes, the tickets are in your bag.
Who wrote Romeo and Juliet?
William Shakespeare.
Hey, are you at the office today?
No, I'm working from home today.
Can dogs fly?
No.
Turn off the kitchen lights, please.
Done — the kitchen lights are off.
Hi, I'm Alex from HR — are you available for a quick chat now?
Yes.
Good morning, it's Maria. Is our team meeting still at 10?
Yes, the meeting is still at 10.
Hey, this is Sam — how are you doing?
Doing well, thanks.
What is the capital of France?
Paris.
Which day comes after Tuesday?
Wednesday.
Who wrote Romeo and Juliet?
Shakespeare.
Do you want coffee?
No, thanks.
Will you be at the concert tomorrow?
I won't be there.
Please send the budget report to Jenna by noon.
I'll send it by noon.
Call Mom and wish her a happy birthday.
I can't make calls, but I can set a reminder for you.
Is the red shirt or the blue shirt better for the interview?
The blue one.
Which is shorter, a minute or an hour?
A minute is shorter than an hour.
How do I boil an egg?
Place the egg in a pot, cover with water, bring to a boil, then cook for about 8–10 minutes.
How can I quickly mute my phone?
Use the silent switch or enable Do Not Disturb.
What comes first: breakfast or lunch?
Breakfast comes first.
Count from one to five.
One, two, three, four, five.
I booked the 2 PM appointment, right?
Yes, it's booked for 2 PM.
I've packed Sara's lunch.
Noted — Sara's lunch is packed.
May I open the window?
Sure, go ahead.
Do we need to bring snacks for the meeting?
No, the office will provide snacks.
Morning! Are you awake, Sam?
Good morning — I'm awake and ready.
Hi, it's Priya. Are you free to chat for a few minutes?
Yes, I have a few minutes now.
Please set a reminder for my meeting at 3 PM.
Reminder set for 3 PM.
Which is faster to get downtown, driving or the subway?
Driving is usually faster.
How do I mute my phone quickly?
Press the volume-down button until the phone is silent.
I have three appointments: dentist, lunch, and meetup. Which comes second?
Lunch is second.
I'll bring the dessert tonight. Okay?
Yes, that works — thanks.
How many wheels does a bicycle have?
Two.
Do you need me to lock the back door?
No — it's already locked.
Hello — this is Marco from HR.
Hello Marco, how can I assist you today?
Please turn off the kitchen lights.
Kitchen lights turned off.
Which is larger, a house cat or a lion?
A lion.
How do I boil an egg?
Place the egg in boiling water and cook for about 9 to 12 minutes.
What comes after Thursday?
Friday.
I've mailed the package.
Noted — the package has been mailed.
Can you lend me your gardening book?
Sorry, I can't lend it right now.
Good evening, this is Dr. Alvarez.
Good evening, Dr. Alvarez.
Book two tickets for the 7 PM show.
Two tickets for the 7 PM show are booked.
What's the capital of France?
Paris.
Is 10 greater than 5?
Yes.
Hey, good morning — I'm Alex.
Good morning, Alex.
Write three items for a quick sandwich shopping list.
Bread, cheese, lettuce.
Which is heavier, a feather or a rock?
A rock is heavier.
How do I turn on my phone?
Press and hold the power button until the screen lights up.
What comes after 14?
I'll arrive at 2 pm, is that okay?
Okay, 2 pm works for me.
How many days are in a week?
Seven.
Are you online right now?
Yes, I'm here.
Hello, I'm moving to Chicago tomorrow.
Hello! Good luck with the move.
Give me a two-word encouragement for my exam.
Stay strong.
Which is brighter, the Moon or a flashlight?
A flashlight.
How can I boil water?
Put water in a pot and heat it until it boils.
List steps to tie a simple knot.
Cross the ends, make a loop with one end, then pull both ends tight.
My phone battery is low; should I charge now?
Yes, you should charge it.
What color do you get when you mix red and white?
Pink.
Is New York in the United States?
Yes.
Good evening, I'm Sara from Denver.
Good evening, Sara — welcome.
What's the third month of the year?
March.
Hi, I'm Mark from Toronto. Morning!
Good morning, Mark!
Did Sarah call about the meeting?
No, she hasn't called.
Please set a reminder for my dentist appointment at 3pm.
Reminder set for 3:00 PM.
Which is heavier, a guitar or a ukulele?
A guitar is generally heavier.
How do I boil an egg?
Bring water to a boil, add the egg, and cook about 9–11 minutes.
List the steps to charge my phone in order.
1) Plug the charger into the outlet. 2) Connect it to your phone. 3) Wait until it reaches full charge.
I've booked the flight for June 10th — confirm?
Confirmed — flight booked for June 10th.
What day comes after Friday?
Saturday.
Hello, I'm back from my trip.
Welcome back!
Can canned beans be microwaved?
Yes — heat them in short intervals, stirring between bursts.
Turn off the kitchen light.
Kitchen light turned off.
Is tea sweeter than coffee?
Not necessarily — sweetness depends on how each drink is prepared.
How do I tie a shoelace?
Cross the laces, pull tight, make a loop with each lace, then knot the loops together.
How many slices will a small pizza have if cut into 6 pieces?
Six slices.
I'm allergic to peanuts.
Understood — I'll note that you're allergic to peanuts.
What's 2+2?
Good evening, this is Dr. Patel checking in.
Good evening, Dr. Patel.
Should I bring the blue mug to the meeting?
Yes, please bring the blue mug.
Put the textbooks on the top shelf, then close the cabinet.
Textbooks placed on the top shelf and cabinet closed.
Hi, I'm Alex. I'll be at the café at 3 PM. Is that still okay?
Yes, 3 PM still works — see you then, Alex.
Hey, what's the capital of France?
Paris.
I'm Maya — can I bring my dog to the office tomorrow?
No, pets aren't allowed in the office.
Order a large black coffee for Sarah, please.
I'll place the order for a large black coffee for Sarah now.
Which is faster from downtown to the airport, the train or the bus?
The train is usually faster.
How do I reset my password?
Open Settings, go to Account, and choose Reset password.
If I used two eggs from a dozen, how many are left?
Ten.
I booked the conference room for Friday at 10.
Confirmed — the conference room is booked for Friday at 10.
Good morning, I'm Tom visiting from Chicago.
Good morning, Tom — welcome to the office.
Does this ticket include baggage?
No, it doesn't include checked baggage.
Remind me to water the plants every Tuesday.
Reminder set for every Tuesday to water the plants.
Which continent is Brazil in?
South America.
Is the blue shirt cheaper than the red one?
Yes, the blue one is cheaper.
How long should I boil pasta?
About eight to twelve minutes, depending on the pasta type.
List the steps to make a simple sandwich.
Slice the bread, add your filling, then close and cut the sandwich.
I have a dentist appointment on Thursday at 2 PM.
Got it — you're scheduled for Thursday at 2 PM.
Which is generally larger, a cat or a dog?
Generally a dog is larger than a cat.
Hey, I'm Sophie — can you save a seat for Jamie?
Seat saved for Jamie.
Do I need a ticket to enter the museum?
Yes, you need a ticket to enter the museum.
What color do you get when you mix blue and yellow?
Green.
Is seven a prime number?
Yes.
Hi, I'm Maria — I'm back from work.
Welcome home, Maria!
Alex here — please set an alarm for 7 AM.
Alarm set for 7:00 AM.
Which is heavier, a laptop or a smartphone?
A laptop.
How do I boil an egg?
Place the egg in a pot, cover with water, bring to a boil, then simmer for about 9–12 minutes.
What should I do first when traveling: pack, check in, or board?
Pack first, then check in, and finally board.
I booked dinner for 7 PM — is that what you wanted?
Yes, that's correct.
Leo: How many days are in February during a leap year?
29 days.
Good morning — it's Jamie from the cafe.
Good morning, Jamie!
Does two plus two equal four?
Yes.
Please remind me to call Dr. Patel at 3 PM.
Reminder set for 3:00 PM to call Dr. Patel.
Is a bicycle faster than walking?
Usually, yes.
How do I connect to Wi-Fi on my phone?
Open your phone's Settings, tap Wi‑Fi, choose the network, and enter the password.
Count backward from five.
I put the keys on the kitchen counter — can you confirm?
Noted — the keys are on the kitchen counter.
What's the color of the sky on a clear day?
Blue.
Hey, it's Marco — do you have a moment?
Yes, I have a moment.
Turn off the lights in the living room.
The living room lights are now off.
Which is larger: a van or a car?
A van is generally larger than a car.
Hi, I'm running late, Sarah.
Hi Sarah — noted that you're running late.
Are you free to join a call at 2 PM?
No, I'm busy at 2 PM.
Please set a reminder for my dentist appointment at 4 PM on Friday.
Reminder set for Friday at 4 PM.
Which is heavier, a bag of apples or a single apple?
A bag of apples.
How do I reheat pizza in the oven?
Preheat the oven to 350°F, place slices on a tray, and bake for 5–7 minutes.
Number these steps to leave the house: lock door, turn off lights, take keys.

1. Turn off lights
2. Take keys
3. Lock door
My sister, Maya, will pick up the package on Tuesday.
Noted — Maya will pick up the package on Tuesday.
Good night, I'm heading to bed.
Good night — sleep well!
What's your name?
I'm the assistant.
At the library, where is the restroom?
The restroom is at the back, next to the study area.
When I said 'the blue shirt,' I meant the navy one.
Understood — you mean the navy blue shirt.
What is 7 minus 3?
Add eggs and bread to my shopping list.
Added eggs and bread to your shopping list.
Is my haircut appointment on Wednesday at noon?
Yes — your haircut is scheduled for Wednesday at 12:00 PM.
How many legs does a spider have?
Eight.
Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
Mars.
Reschedule my lunch to 1 PM.
Lunch rescheduled to 1 PM.
Which takes longer, boiling water on the stove or in the microwave?
Boiling on the stove usually takes longer than microwaving.
Turn off the living room lights.
Living room lights turned off.
Hi, I'm Sam from Denver. Good morning!
Good morning, Sam.
What's the capital of Japan?
Tokyo.
Do you open at 9 AM on weekdays?
Yes, we open at 9 AM on weekdays.
Please set a reminder for my dentist appointment at 3 PM.
Reminder noted for 3 PM.
Which is heavier, an apple or a grape?
The apple is heavier.
How do I boil an egg?
Place eggs in a pot, cover with water, bring to a boil, then simmer for about 9–12 minutes.
List the weekdays starting from Monday.
Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday.
I booked a 2 PM flight to Boston — did that go through?
I can't access your bookings; please check your confirmation email.
Hey there — it's Maria calling from the library.
Hello Maria, welcome to the library.
Is the meeting tomorrow canceled?
No, the meeting is still scheduled.
Who wrote 'Hamlet'?
William Shakespeare.
Turn off all notifications on my phone.
I can't change your phone settings, but you can disable notifications in your phone's settings app.
Which is faster, a bicycle or a car?
A car is faster.
How do I tie a shoelace?
Cross the laces, tuck one under, pull tight, make a loop with each lace, then tie them together.
Order these ingredients: flour, sugar, butter, eggs — what's the usual sequence?
Flour, sugar, butter, eggs.
My package arrived at the front desk — can you mark it as received?
I can't mark packages for you; please note it in your delivery records.
What's 2 plus 2?
Good evening, I'm Alex from Toronto.
Good evening, Alex.
Show me the nearest coffee shops.
I can't access your location, but try searching 'coffee shops near me' in a maps app.
Put my tasks in order: call Mom, finish report, grocery shop.
Finish report, grocery shop, then call Mom.
Morning — I'm Maya and I just arrived at the office.
Good morning, Maya. Welcome.
Is the 2pm slot still open?
Yes, it's available.
Set a reminder for Jack's birthday on May 12.
Reminder set for May 12.
Which is bigger, a cat or a dog?
A dog is generally bigger than a cat.
How do I boil an egg?
Place the egg in a pot, cover with water, and boil for about 10 minutes.
How do I tie shoelaces?
Cross the laces, make a loop with one, wrap the other around it, then pull through.
I left the keys on the kitchen counter, right?
Yes — the keys are on the kitchen counter.
What's two plus two?
Hey, it's Roberto from the cafe.
Hi Roberto — what's up?
Can I wear shorts to tomorrow's office presentation?
No, the office expects business casual for presentations.
Add eggs and flour to my shopping list.
Added eggs and flour to your shopping list.
Is an SUV larger than a sedan?
Yes, an SUV is usually larger.
How do I reset my account password?
Open settings, choose "Change password", and follow the on-screen steps.
What are the first three months of the year?
January, February, March.
I turned off the oven after baking, right?
Yes — the oven is off.
What color do you get when you mix red and blue?
Purple.
Translate "good night" to Portuguese.
Boa noite.
Order these letters alphabetically: C, A, B.
A, B, C.
Goodbye, see you tomorrow.
See you tomorrow — take care.
Good morning, it's Maria from Seattle — are you awake?
Good morning, Maria — I'm awake and ready to help.
Do you understand the agenda I just sent?
Yes, I understand the agenda.
Please set a timer for 15 minutes.
Timer set for 15 minutes.
Which is larger, a car or a bicycle?
A car is larger than a bicycle.
How do I reheat pizza in the oven?
Preheat the oven to 180°C and bake the pizza for 8–10 minutes.
Can you list the days of the week in order?
Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday.
I'll pick up the package at noon; is that okay with you?
Yes, noon works for me.
Hey, this is Daniel — just checking in.
Hi Daniel — it's good to hear from you.
Can I bring my laptop to the meeting?
Yes, please bring your laptop.
Print the two pages I attached, please.
Done — the two pages are printing now.
Which usually costs more: a concert ticket or a movie ticket?
A concert ticket usually costs more than a movie ticket.
How do I tie a basic knot?
Cross the ends, loop one end around the other, then pull both ends tight.
What comes after seven?
Eight.
I booked dinner for 7 PM tonight. Is that okay?
Noted — 7 PM for dinner is confirmed.
Good evening, Sara here — are you available for a quick call?
Good evening, Sara — I'm available for a quick call.
Did you receive my homework file?
Yes, I received your homework file.
Put the documents in folder A, then label them 'Invoices'.
Documents moved to folder A and labeled 'Invoices'.
Hi, it's Laura from accounting. Are you free to talk now?
I'm available now.
Do you need the report by Friday?
Yes, please.
Remind me to call Dr. Kim at 3pm.
Reminder set for 3:00 PM to call Dr. Kim.
Which is bigger, Jupiter or Earth?
Jupiter is bigger.
How do I reset my phone's Wi-Fi?
Open Settings, tap Wi‑Fi, turn it off, then turn it back on.
List the steps to boil an egg.
Fill a pot with water, bring to a boil, add the egg, cook 6–8 minutes, then cool in cold water.
I've booked the conference room for 2pm, okay?
Confirmed — the conference room is reserved at 2:00 PM.
What day comes after Thursday?
Friday.
Good morning, it's Marco. Can you take the 9am train?
Yes, I can take the 9:00 AM train.
Send an email to Sarah asking about the invoice.
I'll draft and send the email to Sarah about the invoice.
How do I tie a shoelace?
Cross the laces, make a loop with one, wrap the other around and pull through to form a knot.
My flight is delayed two hours.
Understood — I'll update your schedule for the new arrival time.
Hey, it's Grandma. Do you want pancakes or waffles?
Pancakes, please.
Is a kilogram heavier than a pound?
Yes, a kilogram is heavier than a pound.
I need to run three errands: bank, post office, grocery. Which should I do first?
Start with the bank.
Is the sky usually blue on a clear day?
Yes.
Hi, I'm Mark — are you available to chat?
Hello Mark — I can chat now.
Please set a reminder for my dentist appointment at 3 pm.
Reminder set for 3 PM.
Which is larger, an elephant or a rabbit?
An elephant is larger than a rabbit.
How do I boil an egg?
Place eggs in boiling water and cook for about 7–10 minutes.
Can you list the first three planets from the Sun?
Mercury, Venus, Earth.
I booked a table for two at 7 pm — is that okay?
That's fine.
Do penguins fly?
No.
Good morning, Ana here.
Good morning, Ana.
Turn off the kitchen lights, please.
The kitchen lights are now off.
Which is colder, snow or sand?
Snow is colder than sand.
How do I tie a shoelace?
Make a knot, form a loop with one lace, wrap the other around and pull through to form a bow.
What's the sequence: morning, afternoon, ____?
Evening.
My flight leaves at noon tomorrow, confirm?
Confirmed — your flight is at noon tomorrow.
Is 2+2 equal to 4?
Yes.
Hey — long time no see! It's Luis.
Hi Luis — nice to hear from you.
Please send the project file to Emma.
Project file sent to Emma.
Hi, I'm Lucas at the front desk — are you available for a five-minute meeting?
Yes, I have five minutes now.
Do you need me to bring my laptop to the workshop?
No, you don't need to bring a laptop.
Please print two copies of this form.
I'll print two copies and leave them on your desk.
Which is heavier, a bowling ball or a tennis ball?
A bowling ball is heavier.
How do I tie a shoelace?
Cross the laces, make a loop with one, wrap the other around it, and pull tight.
What is the third month of the year?
March.
I'll book the 3 PM slot for the meeting, okay?
That works — go ahead and book 3 PM.
Thanks, I'm heading out now.
Safe travels!
Where is the nearest restroom in the mall?
It's next to the food court, just past the escalators.
Which contains more water, a teaspoon or a cup?
A cup contains more water.
How long should I boil an egg for a hard yolk?
About ten minutes.
Could you hand me the blue folder on the shelf?
Here is the blue folder from the top shelf.
Is the small size of the jacket in stock?
Yes, we have the small size available.
Hi, I'm Priya. What's your name?
Jordan.
Which meal comes first, breakfast or dinner?
Breakfast.
Turn on the porch light, please.
I've turned on the porch light.
Which is faster, a bicycle or a car?
A car is typically faster than a bicycle.
I'm bringing my son to piano practice at 4, is that okay?
That's fine — bring him at 4.
Good morning! Are you available for a quick chat?
Yes, I'm available.
Did Sarah bring the blue folder to the office?
No, she didn't bring it.
Please set a reminder for 3 PM about the dentist.
Reminder set for 3 PM about the dentist.
Which is heavier, a kilogram of feathers or a kilogram of steel?
They weigh the same.
How do I boil an egg?
Place eggs in a pot of boiling water and cook for about 8–10 minutes.
List the steps to water a potted plant.
1. Check the soil dryness. 2. Pour water until soil is moist. 3. Let excess drain.
I booked the flight for Friday. Is that confirmed?
Yes, your Friday flight booking is confirmed.
Hey, it's Mark. Are you free tonight to grab dinner?
I'm not free tonight.
How many continents are there?
Seven.
Turn off the kitchen lights, please.
Kitchen lights turned off.
Can I bring a guest to the conference?
Yes, you may bring one guest.
Is email faster than postal mail?
Yes, email is faster.
How do I restart my phone?
Press and hold the power button and then tap Restart.
Put these tasks in order: take out the trash, do the dishes, wash the laundry.
Take out the trash, then do the dishes, and finally wash the laundry.
My password was changed earlier. Can you confirm it went through?
Yes, the password change went through.
What is 2 + 2?
Hello! Are you still there?
Yes, I'm here.
Please open the garage door.
Garage door opened.
Is the office closed on Sundays?
Yes, the office is closed on Sundays.
Hi, I'm Marco from Naples — what's the capital of Italy?
Rome.
Do I need a passport to travel between US states?
No.
Good morning, I'm Sara calling from the bakery.
Good morning, Sara — how can I help today?
Please remind me to water the fern at 6 PM.
Okay — I'll remind you at 6 PM to water the fern.
Which is bigger, a shuttle or a sedan?
A shuttle is bigger than a sedan.
How do I boil an egg?
Place the egg in a pot, cover with water, bring to a boil, then cook 9–12 minutes.
List the months that have 31 days.
January, March, May, July, August, October, December.
My flight number is AA123, confirm that's noted.
Noted — flight AA123 is recorded.
Hey, it's Jamal at reception.
Hi Jamal — what can I do for you?
Send the meeting agenda to the team.
I have sent the agenda to the team.
Which runs faster, a cheetah or a horse?
A cheetah runs faster than a horse.
How do I tie a shoelace?
Cross the laces, make a loop with one, wrap the other around it, then pull tight.
What's the third planet from the Sun?
Earth.
My meeting is at 3 PM in Conference Room B — please confirm.
Confirmed — your meeting is at 3 PM in Conference Room B.
Can I reset my password from the login page?
Yes, you can reset your password from the login page.
Good evening, Dr. Lee here.
Good evening, Dr. Lee — how may I assist you?
Pack my blue sweater into the suitcase.
Blue sweater packed into your suitcase.
What's the capital of Canada?
Ottawa.
Can I bring snacks into the art gallery?
No, outside snacks are not allowed inside the gallery.
Hi, I'm Lisa. Are you free to talk now?
Hello Lisa — yes, I'm available to talk now.
Set a reminder: dentist appointment at 10 AM tomorrow.
Noted — dentist appointment tomorrow at 10 AM.
Which is larger, a rabbit or a horse?
A horse is larger than a rabbit.
How do I boil water for tea?
Fill a kettle with water, heat it until it boils, then pour over your tea.
Give me the steps to tie shoelaces.
Cross the laces, make a loop with one, wrap the other lace around it, pull through and tighten.
I booked a table for two at 7 PM. Is that correct?
Yes, your reservation is for two people at 7 PM.
Good morning, I'm Marcus checking in for the meeting.
Good morning Marcus — you're checked in for the meeting.
Please open the kitchen window.
Open the latch and push the window outward to open it.
Which is faster: walking or running?
Running is faster than walking.
How do I make a peanut butter sandwich?
Spread peanut butter on one slice of bread, place the other slice on top, then cut if you like.
My flight number is AA452. Can you confirm that?
Confirmed: flight AA452.
Does the sun rise in the east?
Yes.
Hey, I'm Ana and I'm joining late.
Hi Ana — welcome, glad you could join us.
Turn off the bedroom lights, please.
Please use the switch by the bedroom door to turn the lights off.
I'm heading to the lecture at noon — can I bring a backpack inside?
Yes, you can bring a backpack.
Hello, I'm Sarah and I'm here for my 2 PM haircut.
Welcome, Sarah — please take a seat and we'll call you at 2.
Please mute the conference call now.
The conference call is muted.
Which is usually larger, a cat or a dog?
Dogs are usually larger than cats.
How do I tie my shoelaces?
Cross the laces, make a loop with one, wrap the other around it, and pull through to form a knot.
Tell me the order to pack for a two-day work trip.
First pack clothes, then toiletries, chargers, and finally travel documents.
I paid the internet bill yesterday.
Noted — the internet bill payment is recorded for yesterday.
Which planet do we live on?
Earth.
Is the community pool open during winter?
No, the pool is closed in winter.
Good morning, I'm Marco and it's my first day here.
Good morning, Marco — welcome to your first day.
Which cools down faster, a metal cup or a ceramic mug?
A metal cup usually cools faster than a ceramic mug.
How do I reload paper into the office printer?
Open the paper tray, place the stack with the printable side down, adjust the guides, then close the tray.
In what order should I secure the house: lock the door, check windows, set the alarm?
1. Check the windows, 2. Lock the door, 3. Set the alarm.
I left my wallet on the dining table.
Okay, noted — your wallet is on the dining table.
Can I park my car in the reserved delivery spot?
No, parking in the reserved delivery spot is not allowed.
Hey, this is Priya calling about the package delivery.
Hi Priya — I'll look up the package status now.
How many slices are in a small pizza?
Six slices.
Can I bring a small backpack on the flight?
Yes.
Hi, I'm Clara from HR, nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too, Clara.
Please remind me to water the fern at 7 PM.
I'll remind you to water the fern at 7 PM.
Which is bigger, a piano or a violin?
A piano is bigger.
How do I boil an egg?

A brick.

Put the egg in a pot, cover with water, bring to a boil for 8 to 10 minutes, then cool it in cold water.

March, April, May, June, July, August, September, October, November, December, January, February.

No, not for most domestic flights.

The sun is hotter.

Cross the laces and pull tight, make a loop with one lace, wrap the other around it and pull through.

Heat a skillet over medium, place the slice in the pan, cover and warm 3 to 4 minutes.

Five.

Place eggs in a pot, cover with water, bring to a boil, then simmer 9–12 minutes.

Connect the drive, copy your photos folder, then safely eject the drive.
